Niyam — the same app in Hindi, Telugu & Tamil

Real screenshots from the running app (Pixel 9 emulator, 2026-06-11). Each row is one tap away in Settings → Display language: the mantra switches to that script and the meaning is shown in that language — Gayatri Mantra shown in all three for comparison. The unlock overlay was captured live while blocking YouTube.

Note: the app chrome (buttons like “Continue”, labels like “YOUR SADHANA”) stays English in this build — what localises today is the mantra text and its meaning. Full chrome translation is a separate, queueable piece of work.

Hindi — हिन्दी

Devanagari script · Hindi meaning

Telugu — తెలుగు

Telugu script · Telugu meaning
